app.name: hfl
app.description: Run HuggingFace models locally like Ollama.

pull.description: Download a model from HuggingFace Hub.

run.description: Start an interactive chat with a model.

serve.description: Start the API server (OpenAI + Ollama compatible).

options.api_key: API key for authentication (recommended for network exposure)

search.description: Search models on HuggingFace Hub with interactive pagination.
search.long_description:
Search models on HuggingFace Hub with interactive pagination.

Controls:
  SPACE/ENTER    Next page
  q/Q/ESC        Exit
  p              Previous page

Examples:
  hfl search llama
  hfl search mistral --gguf
  hfl search phi --limit 50 --page-size 5
  hfl search qwen --max-params 14        # Models < 14B
  hfl search llama --min-params 70       # Models >= 70B

options.gguf_only: Show only models with GGUF files

args.model: Name of the model to delete

inspect.description: Show detailed information about a model.

alias.description: Assign an alias to an existing model.
alias.long_description:
Assign an alias to an existing model.

Examples:
  hfl alias qwen3-coder-30b-instruct-q4_k_m coder
  hfl run coder

login.description: Configure your HuggingFace token for faster downloads.
login.long_description:
Configure your HuggingFace token for faster downloads.

Get your token at: https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens

Benefits:
  - Faster downloads (authenticated rate limits)
  - Access to gated models (Llama, Gemma, etc.)

tts.description: Synthesize text to an audio file.

speak.description: Synthesize text and play it directly.

discover.description: V4: filter the HuggingFace Hub catalogue by capability and popularity.

options.task: Use case: chat / code / vision / embeddings / tools

lora.description: V4: hot-swap LoRA adapters on a loaded model.

pull-smart.description: V4: pull the optimal Hub variant for the current hardware.

compliance-dashboard.description: V4: license / EU AI Act compliance overview of the local registry.

draft-recommend.description: V4: recommend a draft model for speculative decoding.

options.max_ratio: Max ratio of draft size to target size

messages.token_saved: Token saved. Downloads will now be faster.
messages.auth_required: Authentication: Bearer <api-key> or X-API-Key header required
messages.to_download: To download a model use: hfl pull <model>
messages.gguf_detected: GGUF format detected, will download quantized version.
messages.unsupported_tip: {count} model(s) have unsupported types. Use --supported-only to hide them.
messages.no_conversion_needed: No GGUF conversion needed for this model type.

errors.format_error: Format error: The model name is invalid.
errors.check_name_or_search: Check the name or use 'hfl search' to search.
errors.use_list_to_see: Use 'hfl list' to see available models.
errors.model_downloaded_but: The model has been downloaded but cannot be run with llama.cpp.
errors.consider_searching_gguf: Consider searching for a GGUF version of the model:
errors.search_min_chars: Search must have at least 3 characters.
errors.alias_in_use: The alias '{alias}' is already in use by: {model}
errors.unsupported_type_hint: This model type is not supported by HFL. Only LLM and TTS models can be run.
errors.use_tts_command: For TTS models, use: hfl tts <model> "text" or hfl speak <model> "text"
errors.use_run_command: For LLM models, use: hfl run <model>
errors.unsupported_model_type_hint: HFL does not support {type} models yet. Only LLM (text generation) models are currently supported.
errors.tts_disabled: TTS functionality is temporarily disabled. Only LLM models are supported.

warnings.network_exposure: Exposing the server to the network. Prompts sent to the API will be accessible from any device on the network.
warnings.no_api_key: No API key set. Anyone on the network can access the API.

legal.ai_disclaimer: AI models may generate incorrect, biased, or inappropriate information. The user is responsible for the use they make of the generated responses.

table.name: Name
table.no_models: No downloaded models. Use 'hfl pull' to download.
table.no_supported_models: No supported models. Use 'hfl list' to see all models.

help.description: Show help information and available options.
help.general_help: HFL — Run HuggingFace models locally like Ollama.
help.common_pull: Download a model from HuggingFace Hub
help.common_run: Start an interactive chat with a model
help.more_info: Run 'hfl <command> --help' for details on any command.
help.extras_intro:
HFL uses optional dependency groups to keep the base install lightweight.
Extras are installed via pip (Python's package manager).

Syntax:  pip install hfl[<extra>]
         pip install hfl[<extra1>,<extra2>]
         pip install hfl[all]
help.extras_hint: Use 'hfl help --extras' to see this list at any time.

llama.name: llama
llama.description:
Provides the llama.cpp inference engine for running GGUF-quantized models.
Requires a C++ compiler (gcc/clang/MSVC) and CMake for compilation.

transformers.name: transformers
transformers.description:
Provides the Transformers inference engine for running safetensors models.
Includes PyTorch (~2GB), Accelerate for GPU offloading, and SentencePiece tokenizer.

vllm.name: vllm
vllm.description:
Provides the vLLM engine for high-throughput serving with PagedAttention.
Only available on Linux with NVIDIA CUDA GPUs.

convert.name: convert
convert.description:
Enables converting safetensors models to GGUF format with quantization.
Required for 'hfl pull' when downloading non-GGUF models.

tts.name: tts
tts.description:
Enables text-to-speech synthesis using the Bark model via Transformers.
Includes PyTorch, torchaudio for audio processing, and soundfile for WAV output.

coqui.name: coqui
coqui.description:
Enables text-to-speech with Coqui TTS for high-quality multi-speaker synthesis.
Supports multiple languages and voice cloning.

audio.name: audio
audio.description:
Enables direct audio playback from the terminal.
Used by 'hfl speak' to play synthesized audio without saving to a file.

tray.name: tray
tray.summary: System tray icon for GUI server management
tray.description:
Adds a system tray icon to start/stop the server from any OS.
Used with 'hfl serve --tray'. Works on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

all.name: all
all.description:
Installs all optional dependencies at once.
Convenient for development or if you want full functionality.
